samples.xml_description:
Design a simplified radix-2 divider on 8-bit numbers. Clock signal. Reset signal. Signed or unsigned operation. Input operand DIVIDEND. Input operand DIVISOR. Valid operation. Result ready. Result valid. Output result. 0 1 2 3 4 Initialize the operation. always @(*) begin
 next_SR = 'd0;
 next_cnt = 'd0;
 next_res_valid = 'd0;
 next_res = 'd0;
 next_div_valid = 'd0;
 next_div_result = 'd0;
 next_div_valid = 'd0;
 next_div_result = 'd0;
 next_div_valid = 'd0;
 next_div_result = 'd0;
end

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
 if (rst) begin
  cnt <= 'd0;
  SR <= 'd0;
  div_valid <= 'd0;
  div_result <= 'd0;
  res_valid <= 'd0;
  res <= 'd0;
 end
 else begin
  if (opn_valid && ~res_valid) begin
   dividend_reg <= dividend;
   divisor_reg <= divisor;
  end
  if (cnt == 8) begin
   cnt <= 'd0;
   SR <= {dividend_reg, 1'b0};
   divisor_reg <= (sign && divisor_reg[15]) ? ~divisor_reg + 1 : divisor_reg;
   NEG_DIVISOR <= (sign && divisor_reg[15]) ? ~divisor_reg + 1 : ~divisor_reg;
   div_valid <= 'b1;
  end
  else if (res_valid && res_ready) begin
   res_valid <= 'd0;
   res <= 'd0;
  end
  else if (div_valid) begin
   div_valid <= 'd0;
   div_result <= 'd0;
  end
  else begin
   if (cnt == 0) begin
    cnt <= cnt + 1;
    next_SR = (sign && dividend_reg[15]) ? ~dividend_reg + 1 : dividend_reg;
   end
   else begin
    {carry, borrow, res} = NEG_DIVISOR - SR[15:0];
    next_SR = (carry) ? {divisor_reg, SR[14:0], 1'b0} : {borrow, SR[14:0], 1'b1};
    next_cnt = cnt + 1;
   end
   next_res_valid = 'b1;
  end
end
end

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
 if (rst) begin
  cnt <= 'd0;
  SR <= 'd0;
  div_valid <= 'd0;
  div_result <= 'd0;
  res_valid <= 'd0;
  res <= 'd0;
 end
 else begin
  if (opn_valid && ~res_valid) begin
   dividend_reg <= dividend;
   divisor_reg <= divisor;
  end
  if (cnt == 8) begin
   cnt <= 'd0;
   SR <= {dividend_reg, 1'b0};
   divisor_reg <= (sign && divisor_reg[15]) ? ~divisor_reg + 1 : divisor_reg;
   NEG_DIVISOR <= (sign && divisor_reg[15]) ? ~divisor_reg + 1 : ~divisor_reg;
   div_valid <= 'b1;
  end
  else if (res_valid && res_ready) begin
   res_valid <= 'd0;
   res <= 'd0;
  end
  else if (div_valid) begin
   div_valid <= 'd0;
   div_result <= 'd0;
  end
  else begin
   if (cnt == 0) begin
    cnt <= cnt + 1;
    next_SR = (sign && dividend_reg[15]) ? ~dividend_reg + 1 : dividend_reg;
   end
   else begin
    {carry, borrow, res} = NEG_DIVISOR - SR[15:0];
    next_SR = (carry) ? {divisor_reg, SR[14:0], 1'b0} : {borrow, SR[14:0], 1'b1};
    next_cnt = cnt + 1;
   end
   next_res_valid = 'b1;
  end
end
end

always @(posedge clk or posedge rst) begin
 if (rst) begin
  cnt <= 'd0;
&emsp
